title: aster umbelliformis
intro: Aster umbelliformis, also known as White Pyrethrum or Pyrethrum, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its clusters of small white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to repel insects and act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral agent. The health benefits of Aster umbelliformis include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as colds and coughs. Aster umbelliformis is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
